\section*{Shared-space steering experiment}
\subsection*{Setup}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Model: meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf
  \item Layer: 28
  \item Alpha: 45.0
  \item Inject window: start\_step=1, first\_n=24
  \item Pirate threshold: 2
\end{itemize}
